triggers.name: Enemy timer: Elemental Maelstrom
triggers.comments: ~0m30s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 5 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Magician level 43. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Mala
triggers.comments: ~11m00s at level 50 (formula 9, cap 140 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Magician level 60. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Wrath of the Elements
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Wrath of the Elements(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))?\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m30s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 5 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Magician level 55. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Elemental Maelstrom
triggers.pattern: ^Your Elemental Maelstrom(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Mala
triggers.pattern: ^Your Mala(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
